content.speakerText: How do I know it went through? Will I get an email?
content.speakerTextCn: 怎么确认报名成功？会收到邮件吗？

options.text: You’ll get a confirmation email within 24 hours.
You’ll receive a text message in 3 days.
Just wait for a phone call from the office.
You don’t need any confirmation — it’s automatic.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'You’ll get a confirmation email within 24 hours.'，因为对话中明确提到邮件是主要确认方式。其他选项错误：短信三天后送达不符合时间要求，电话通知未被提及，而'无需确认'与主动确认反馈的场景目标相悖。

content.speakerText: Can I print a receipt? I need it for my visa records.
content.speakerTextCn: 能打印收据吗？我需要用于签证材料。

options.text: Sure! Go to ‘My Exams’ and click ‘Print Receipt’.
Sorry, we don’t issue receipts for visa purposes.
You can ask the front desk for a printed copy.
Receipts are only available after the exam date.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Sure! Go to ‘My Exams’ and click ‘Print Receipt’.'，与对话中提供的具体操作一致。其他选项错误：拒绝提供收据违背用户需求，前台打印未被提及，且收据应在报名后立即可用，而非考试后。

content.speakerText: I just registered for the TOEFL. How can I make sure everything is recorded correctly?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚报名了托福考试，如何确保所有信息都正确记录？

options.text: Check your email and portal for confirmation and status.
Call the test center tomorrow to verify your details.
Wait for a letter to arrive in the mail.
Ask a friend who took the test last year.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调通过邮件和门户双重确认，符合场景核心策略。其他选项不可靠：电话验证非标准流程，纸质信件已过时，而向他人询问不能替代官��系统确认。
